findings.message: Direct import of SessionLocal into routes layer exposes database engine implementation. Routes should not depend directly on database internals.
findings.suggestion: Remove SessionLocal from this import. All database access should route through the repository layer (db.repository module).

findings.message: Layering violation: create_item handler opens its own session and directly manipulates the database, bypassing the repository layer. The repository module already provides a create_item function that should be used.
findings.suggestion: Refactor to call the repository's create_item(session, payload.name) function instead of directly instantiating Item and calling session methods. Remove SessionLocal import. Import create_item from ..db.repository.
